name: Thunderbird SECurity AntiVirus
author: Jan Bludau
description: Checking every Email Attachment at Hybrid-Analysis.com a service Provider that scanns with 70+ Antivirus Programs.

data_collection_permissions.description: Schema describing what data the extension may collect; values indicate categories of data and the shape of each category.

storage.description: Stores opt-in flags, settings and cached metadata locally on the user's device. No data is sent to external services for storage.

websiteContent.description: Analyzes email content and attachments locally to detect candidates for scanning. Message content is not sent externally unless the user explicitly opts in to a one-off scan.

fileUploads.description: One-off file uploads (attachments) triggered by the user are sent to external analyzer services only after explicit per-message or options opt-in.
